title: [The Vengeful Siren, Stern]
description: Sunlight reflects off the gleaming brass railing lining the spacious, pointed balcony, and a sturdy koa and brass telescope occupies a break in the railing at the far point, allowing it to swivel across both island and sea.  Hanging from the wall on one side of the aperture leading inside is a carved ivory dart board.  A lacquered koa cupboard rests beneath it, a frosted glass pitcher on top pushed into the shade.  The humidity hangs heavy in the air, the tang of salt on the nigh-perpetual ocean breeze.
